page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance belonging to the ecs.gn5i server family. It features 8 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For hardware acceleration, it bundles a single NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not include local storage, and network performance is rated at a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the CPU and memory subsystems deliver entry-level performance. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is rated in the bottom 10%, while multi-core performance falls in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth tests show average performance for small-block cached reads at 340.09 GB/sec and large-block writes at 25.34 GB/sec, but large-block uncached reads are weaker at 37.18 GB/sec. Passmark CPU and memory scores align with these findings, placing the instance in the average to weak categories for general compute, encryption, and database operations.

Given its legacy Intel Xeon Broadwell architecture and Pascal-generation GPU, this instance offers a cost-effective entry point for workloads requiring GPU acceleration without the premium cost of modern high-end accelerators. The absence of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage. The instance is suited for lightweight GPU-accelerated tasks, legacy CUDA applications, basic machine learning inference, and video transcoding, rather than high-performance computing or intensive database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for entry-level parallel processing workloads. It is configured with 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of system memory. The instance features a bundled NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM, while local storage is absent, and network bandwidth is limited to a 2 Gbps baseline. Benchmark results indicate modest CPU and memory performance, with stress-ng and Passmark scores placing the instance in the lower-to-average performance tiers. This hardware profile makes the ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge a qualitatively cost-efficient option for legacy CUDA applications, lightweight machine learning inference, and basic video transcoding tasks that require dedicated GPU acceleration without the high cost of modern enterprise GPUs.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, designed for entry-level parallel computing workloads.

tagline: An entry-level GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and an NVIDIA Pascal GPU for lightweight parallel computing workloads.
